svg.text: Each run's start and end in the (behavioral value, forecast-move) plane
Open dot = round 1 → filled arrowhead = final round. One straight arrow per run (no intermediate rounds), one panel per experiment family.

The 9 scheduled-judge-swap runs are drawn hollow (dashed, open head): they contain a mid-run judge change the straight start-to-end arrow cannot represent. Faint background field: the self-only recurrence Δ value = ρ·σ.
OLMo risk grid + judge schedules — 21 runs (9 hollow)
